title: MULTIMODAL ROBOTIC SYSTEM
what: Full stack architecture and development of a bio-inspired multimodal robotic system
Aerial to marine transitioning gait behavior
Soft actuator and chasis development design for transitioning media
how: Compliant materials, design for assembly (DFA) driven design, and subtractive manufacturing
ROS2 control software and sensor integration
Automated/Systematic testing procedures across aerial, marine, and transitioning media
results: Expected: novel multimodal gait behavior characterization across aerial and marine media
Ongoing: autonomous aerial and marine gait behavior testing; full-system integration accross hardware and software
